text: Hey, this meeting is being recorded.
Good, you?
Yeah, it's going really well.
Just cranking through Q4.

Looking forward to the holidays.

But even we want to start a few things this year.
So that's why now we wanted to reconnect.

And I tried to answer some of those questions that you sent over email.

Yeah, absolutely.
So there are different pieces to it, right?

Like, okay, like we know our ICP and we know some of these things, but I think that, you know, we have been growing a lot in the last three years and we also have been acquired.
So we have a bit of a new thing too and we want to kind of put everything into consideration when we are thinking more about like our SEO strategy and like the content that we create, right?
So I think it's kind of good to take that pause and I like a lot that you have that initial approach.
That's why I was also very curious to see like what's the outcome of the first phase to make sure that it's what also we have in mind.
So that's one of the pieces.
And then also the second piece is definitely we want to increase more the content we generate.
And then how we balance that SEO with AI search now, like what...
Are the right targets we need to be thinking about and how you prioritize SEO versus AI search or maybe how do you solve for both and things like this.
But I think that there is a lot more that we can be doing.
So that's number two.

then number three, we have been fairly good in everything more like English-speaking countries, but like sometimes in the non-English, we just go with a quick translation and we want to be better at also generating content.

Or like ads growth and things like this.

Anything to add?

You can slice and dice the data to see like one week versus the next.

I'm just curious your thoughts.
Yeah, I would say that, you know, obviously we want both.
And if someone's not clicking to the website, then there's not an opportunity to convert the lead unless, you know, they're sort of having that information, saving it for later.
And so we're trying to optimize for having citations where someone can actually, you know, read the answer, but then see your company's content connected to the answer.
Because naturally, like clicks from AI search, like they're full.

We're 0.4 times more likely to convert, but we wouldn't, you know, we're going to optimize for the clicks, but we also want to make sure, like, if we're creating great content, it should appear in both ways, right?
Like, we could only, you could only get referenced in the answer if you had some sort of content connected to it.
So, I mean, you know, what someone does once they search in ChatGPT, like, we control what we can control, right?
Like, we can't control where someone's going to go, but we can control, like, if there's content that's a great answer to that question.
If you show up in the answer, we can track those sorts of things.
So, mean, you know, think about it this way, right?
Like, if we didn't help customers drive, one, more organic traffic to their site, and two, traffic that is driving conversions, like, companies wouldn't want to continue partnering with us.
So, I would say, like, we're very invested in making sure that there's citations, because if there are citations, then you get site.
there's citations, you site,
Visits that are more likely to convert than traditional search visits.

When writing content, like the strategy, when you think SEO or AI search, is it different?

We're thinking about who are you going after?
What is everything that could be relevant to the way that they would search?
Where there's questions that are connected to your solutions, your products.
But for the SEO side, a lot of it can be combined.

SEO side, side to But, But, Thank

So I think, like, you know, GEO, everybody's still trying to figure out, like, what is the best way to appeal to AI search engines?
And there's certain things that you can do with the structure of the content, right?

It's going to be better if you have things in, like, listicles, if you have FAQs, if you have, like, very clear H1, H2, H3s, if you've got all the SEO meta tags optimized, you know, that's obviously a lot more important.
But it's not like a one or the other type of approach.
It's like, where can we combine the best of both worlds?
And for us, it's, you know, be focused in the keyword analysis, but also...
